description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with long hair, wearing a patterned, long-sleeved tunic that extends to mid-thigh, paired with fitted pants and sturdy lace-up boots. The outfit is accessorized with a wide belt at the waist and gloves that cover the hands. The figure also wears distinctive eyewear, possibly goggles, and has a confident, upright stance with arms extended horizontally. The clothing appears to be designed for utility and comfort, suitable for urban exploration or casual streetwear. The overall appearance suggests a modern, slightly adventurous style, with layered garments and practical accessories. The figure's facial features are partially obscured by the eyewear, adding a sense of mystery.
description: An adult pedestrian with long hair, wearing a patterned tunic, fitted pants, boots, gloves, and goggles, standing upright with arms outstretched. The style is modern and practical, with layered clothing and accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's facial features, goggles, belt, gloves, and the full detail of the tunic and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the hair, and the layered effect of the tunic and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the tunic's drape, the belt, and the fitted pants, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and the side silhouette of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved patterned tunic, fitted pants, wide belt, gloves, and goggles
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with center part
